repair all windows glazing seals, sash cords, sash frames and latches or hardware (1001(h), (j), & 708 hc) building permit required (301 hc) you are required to obtain a building permit to correct this violation. submit a copy of this "notice of violation" with your application and reference the complaint number on your building permit application. call the building inspector for periodic and or final inspection(s). when all work is complete, the building inspector must perform the final inspection and sign the job card, before the housing inspector can abate this violation. please present the signed job card indicating that work is complete to the housing inspector on the re-inspection day.
